'''Krayn's [[Bosun/Legends|bosun]]''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ranat/Legends|Ranat]] slaver working for the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and crime-lord [[Krayn]] in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Krayn's 'bosun' and the scene of the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (comic series)|Jedi Quest]] ''comics that initially affiliates with the character do not appear in [[Jude Watson]]'s original ''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' story.

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Quest 2|''Jedi Quest'' 2]] {{1st}}
*[[Jedi Quest 3|''Jedi Quest'' 3]]
